tool.name: descseq
tool.summary: Report stable sequence-record descriptions and metadata summaries in tabular form

sections.title: Overview
sections.content: `descseq` reports stable per-record sequence descriptions and metadata using the shared EMBOSS-RS sequence and annotated-record models. It is useful for plain FASTA inputs and richer EMBL or GenBank inputs because it summarizes the typed metadata already carried by the core record representation instead of reparsing format-specific text ad hoc.

sections.title: Inputs
sections.content: The current v1 tool accepts one local sequence input path and preserves source record order. Plain sequence records and annotated records are both supported through the shared IO layer.

sections.title: Outputs
sections.content: The output is a stable tabular report with one row per input record. The current schema reports `ordinal`, `identifier`, `display_name`, `description`, `length`, `molecule`, `alphabet`, `feature_count`, `source`, `organism`, and `topology`. Missing metadata values are rendered as `-` in the CLI table output.

sections.title: Current Status
sections.content: This method is implemented and exposed through `emboss-rs descseq`. Validation currently covers both plain multi-record FASTA input and annotated GenBank input so the reported schema is locked down for both unannotated and annotation-aware records.

sections.title: Caveats
sections.content: The v1 output is intentionally conservative and metadata-driven. It reports only fields already represented cleanly in the shared core types and does not attempt format-specific free-text harvesting beyond those typed fields.

artifacts.label: Three-record FASTA fixture
artifacts.description: Repository-managed plain FASTA fixture used to validate source-order summary reporting.

artifacts.label: Annotated GenBank fixture
artifacts.description: Repository-managed annotated GenBank fixture used to validate annotation-aware summary reporting.

examples.title: Summarize plain FASTA records in stable source order
examples.description: Reports one table row per FASTA record with identifier, description, length, molecule, and alphabet fields.

expected_outputs.label: Sequence description rows
expected_outputs.description: The plain sequence input is summarized as a stable per-record tabular report.
